scripts.dev: nub run velite && nub run ensure-env && tsx ./scripts/sync-dev-vars.ts && vite dev
scripts.dev:fresh: node ./scripts/ensure-dev-port.mjs && rm -rf node_modules/.vite && nub run velite && nub run ensure-env && tsx ./scripts/sync-dev-vars.ts && vite dev
scripts.build: nub run velite && nub run ensure-env && nub run wrangler-types && vite build && tsx ./scripts/assert-turnstile-embed.ts
scripts.check: nub run velite && nub run ensure-env && nub run wrangler-types && svelte-kit sync && nub -w exec vp check && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.fix: nub run velite && nub run ensure-env && nub run wrangler-types && svelte-kit sync && nub -w exec vp check --fix && svelte-check --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json
scripts.verify: nub run velite && nub run ensure-env && nub run wrangler-types && nub check && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts && PUBLIC_TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY=0xTEST_SITE_KEY_EMBED vite build && tsx ./scripts/assert-turnstile-embed.ts
